title: Limit System Access to Permitted Transactions and Functions
description: limit system access to the types of transactions and functions that authorized users are permitted to execute

checks.name: Permitted Transactions and Functions are Defined for Authorized Users
checks.purpose: Verify that authorized user roles and permitted functions are defined via AD group policy, NTFS permissions, and logon rights

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Defined Transactions and Functions
checks.purpose: Confirm that enforcement mechanisms such as AppLocker, Software Restriction Policies, or NTFS permissions actively limit users to their permitted functions

checks.name: Permitted Transactions and Functions are Defined for Authorized Users
checks.purpose: Verify that authorized user roles and permitted functions are defined via AD group policy, NTFS permissions, and logon rights

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Defined Transactions and Functions
checks.purpose: Confirm that enforcement mechanisms such as NTFS permissions, share permissions, and AD role assignments actively limit users to their permitted functions

checks.name: Permitted Transactions and Functions are Defined for Authorized Users
checks.expected_result: Named users or groups with explicitly scoped sudo rules; no ALL=(ALL) ALL without justification
checks.purpose: Verify that permitted elevated functions are explicitly defined per user or group via sudoers and group membership

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Defined Transactions and Functions
checks.purpose: Confirm that file permissions, sudoers restrictions, PAM controls, and SELinux/AppArmor actively enforce function-level access limits

checks.name: Permitted Transactions and Functions are Defined for Authorized Users
checks.expected_result: Named users or groups with explicitly scoped sudo rules; no ALL=(ALL) ALL without justification
checks.purpose: Verify that permitted elevated functions are explicitly defined per user or group via sudoers and group membership

checks.name: System Access is Limited to Defined Transactions and Functions
checks.purpose: Confirm that file permissions, sudoers restrictions, PAM controls, and AppArmor actively enforce function-level access limits
